---
title: "Simon Ghyselincks"
description: "PhD student at UBC Computer Science — research in scientific machine learning and generative AI"
sidebar: false
toc: false
image: /www/images/profile-pictures/park-small.jpg
resources:
  - "/www/images/profile-pictures/park-small.jpg"
aliases:
  - content/about/overview.html

about:
    id: hero-heading
    template: trestles
    image-shape: round
    image: /www/images/profile-pictures/park-small.jpg
    links:
      - icon: github
        href: "https://github.com/chipnbits"
      - icon: linkedin
        href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/simonghyselincks/"

listing:
  - id: recent-items
    contents:
      - blog/posts
      - content/talks/posts
      - content/publications/*/index.qmd
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    max-items: 5
    fields: [image, date, title, description]
    image-align: left
    categories: false
---

:::{#hero-heading}

Welcome to my personal site! I'm Simon Ghyselincks, a **PhD-track student** at the University of British Columbia (UBC) in the Department of Computer Science.

I completed my BASc in Engineering Physics with a minor in Computer Science at UBC in 2025. I am currently working with Professor [Eldad Haber](https://scholar.google.ca/citations?user=NZmEIS8AAAAJ&hl=en) from UBC Earth and Ocean Sciences and Professor [Evan Shelhamer](https://scholar.google.ca/citations?user=-ltRSM0AAAAJ&hl=en) from UBC Computer Science on scientific machine learning and generative AI with broad applications to geophysics and geospatial data. You can find my recent publications [here](/content/publications/index.qmd).

Feel free to connect with me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/simonghyselincks) or check out my [GitHub](https://github.com/chipnbits).

:::

## Recent

:::{#recent-items}
:::
